title: 3D Amethyst Tools
description: This resource pack replaces the default netherite tools and weapons with purple/amethyst versions.
body:
> ### This pack is an add-on for my other pack [**Tools'n Stuff**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tools-and-stuff)

> ### ![Desc](https://img.icons8.com/material-rounded/ffffff/16/multiline-text.png) Description
This pack aims to make the **netherite tools** more **visualy pleasing** by giving them a modern **3D look** and making them **amethyst color** for those who like the color purple. 

> ### ![Dload](https://img.icons8.com/material-rounded/ffffff/16/download--v1.png) Requires _Optifine_ or _EMF_ for the trident to work correctly.
[![Button](https://i.imgur.com/UVRVZre.png)](https://optifine.net/downloads)
[![Button](https://i.imgur.com/y8w5dEU.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)

> ### ![Item](https://img.icons8.com/material-rounded/ffffff/16/new-product.png) Item List
  At this moment these are the items included in the pack:
 - Netherite swords, pickaxes, axes, shovels and hoes.
 - The Trident

> ### ![Issue](https://img.icons8.com/material-rounded/ffffff/16/error--v1.png) Change Log
Send an **issue report or feedback** by filling out the **form** _(requires Google login)_.

- **If you showcase my pack in a video** feel free to **send me a link** in the form. I would truly appreciate it. :)

[![Button](https://i.imgur.com/om59Noe.png)](https://forms.gle/YUEKAxePt83EsLB37)

```
[02/09/24] 3D Amethys Tools v1.0
└ Created pack
```
